visual: Side-stepping laterally while the hands trace continuous circles in front of the torso, one rising as the other falls, waist rotating smoothly.
motion_description: The routine features a slow, continuous lateral progression, beginning with a weight shift onto the left leg and a torso rotation to the left. During this movement, the right arm arcs upward to sweep across the face while the left hand traces a lower horizontal path across the waist. The right foot steps inward, transferring weight to the right leg and rotating the torso to the right; concurrently, the arm roles reverse, with the left hand sweeping high and the right hand sweeping low. The sequence flows seamlessly into an outward lateral step with the left foot, repeating the initial weight shift and arm coordination.
